primary_text:
If you are paying for pet insurance, check what it actually covers.

Routine consults? Usually not. Vaccinations? No. Dental? No. Blood tests? No.

Insurance covers emergencies. Best for Pet covers everything else. $50/month. Unlimited vet consults. All vaccinations. $250 off dental. Annual blood and urine tests. 24/7 VetChat.

The two work together. One for the unexpected. One for the everyday.

No joining fee. No waiting period. Cancel anytime.

Find a participating clinic near you.
headline: Check what pet insurance actually covers.
cta: Find a participating clinic near you
